title: Resources for Current PhD Students - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Resources for Current PhD Students - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Resources for Current PhD Students
Guiding the way through your PhD program
Wherever you are on your Khoury College doctoral journey, we’re here to help. Our dedicated advising team and interdisciplinary faculty offer strong support and valuable guidance to improve your studies, deepen your research, and advance through degree milestones.
PhD advising and academic support
You have the power to change the world. To help you on your journey, Khoury College of Computer Sciences connects PhD students with student groups, career services, and top-notch facilities.
Advising and academic support
Quick links: The resources you need
Academic policies and procedures: Academic policies, forms, events, and more
New PhD students: Orientation details, registration info, account set-up, and more
Office of the Registrar: Academic calendar, policies, forms, and more
Student Hub: Classroom assignments, billing, grades, parking permits, and more
Student Life: Health and well-being, ways to get involved, and more
Financial support for PhD students
Northeastern University and Khoury College of Computer Sciences offer a number of financial aid and scholarship opportunities to help finance our PhD students’ education. Funding opportunities vary based on program and research funding availability.
Learn more about financial support
Your research community
Explore our impactful research projects, innovative research spaces, and interdisciplinary institutes — then work with our expert faculty, collaborative industry partners, and other labs and institutions across Boston and the globe.
Explore Khoury College research
Have questions?
Contact the graduate programs team. We’re here to help!
Contact us
